    "Ladder reinforcement spacing exceeds the maximum limit specified by TMS 402/602"

  "actions": [
    "Issue a non-conformance report (NCR)",
    "Stop further masonry work above the affected courses",

  "rationale": "TMS 402/602 specifies a maximum vertical spacing for joint reinforcement (typically 16 inches). Exceeding this spacing reduces the lateral load capacity and shear resistance of the masonry wall, making it non-compliant and structurally deficient for heavy-industrial applications.",

    "TMS 402/602",
    "TMS 602 Article 3.2"
  ]
